calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Written Discovery And Requst For Monetary Sanctions Of $396; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Douglas Mackay
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
DOUGLAS G. MACKAY, Esq., Law Office of, (916) 851-3764, for Defendant.

No other appearances.

RE: DEFENDANT IRISH CONSTRUCTION's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To Written Discovery And Requst For Monetary Sanctions Of $396.

Defense Counsel stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem Judge. The pro tem Judge and Defense Counsel (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Not argued/Contested. The court calls the matter and confirms its tentative ruling on the record. No objection to the preceding is presented.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Irish Construction's unopposed Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Of $396 is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve objection-free, code compliant, verified responses and responsive documents (if applicable) within ten days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $398 are granted against Plaintiff in favor of Defendant. Sanctions shall be paid within fourteen days of notice of entry of this order.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed form of order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
